title: magnistipula butayei subsp. glabriuscula
intro: Magnistipula butayei subsp. glabriuscula, also known as a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, is a shrub or small tree native to the Philippines. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Magnistipula butayei subsp. glabriuscula include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by extracting its leaves and roots, which can be used in traditional medicine or as a dietary supplement to promote overall well-being.
